calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Drexel A. Bradshaw, Esq. was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Teresa Turner.
Default was entered against defendant on June 25, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 17, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Drexel, and against the Defaulted Defendant Teresa Turner as follows:

Damages/Principal - $145,456.08.
Prejudgment Interest - $9,086.02.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - $370.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $154,912.10.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
